workflows.title: Brainstorm
workflows.description: Option exploration workflow for turning fuzzy intent into concrete directions before planning or implementation.
workflows.successDefinition: The problem frame, tradeoffs, and recommended direction are concrete enough to move into specification or planning.

workflows.title: Spec
workflows.description: Lightweight specification workflow for broad or risky work that needs intent, constraints, acceptance criteria, and a quality contract before planning.
workflows.successDefinition: Intent, constraints, acceptance criteria, and quality expectations are stable enough to plan implementation.

workflows.title: Plan
workflows.description: Planning workflow for turning a scoped goal into milestones, acceptance criteria, dependencies, and risks before implementation.
workflows.successDefinition: The plan is ordered, risk-aware, and verifiable enough to hand to development.

workflows.title: Develop
workflows.description: Scoped implementation workflow for local code or documentation changes with tight scope control and local verification.
workflows.successDefinition: The scoped change is implemented, locally verified, and closed with explicit blockers or follow-up routing.

workflows.title: Check
workflows.description: Verification-design workflow for mapping behavior claims to automated checks, manual checks, proof targets, blockers, and explicit coverage gaps.
workflows.successDefinition: The verification plan names the behavior to prove, the highest-value checks, and any explicit proof gaps.

checkLane.title: Verify Lane
verificationPrompts: Map each claim to a concrete proof target.
Separate automated checks from manual validation.
Name blockers and coverage gaps explicitly.

workflows.title: Review
workflows.description: Independent merge-readiness review focused on evidence-backed findings, severity, verification gaps, residual risk, and handoff clarity.
workflows.successDefinition: Findings are evidence-backed, severity-ordered, and include proof gaps plus any human-owned handoff notes.

checkLane.title: Review Lane
verificationPrompts: Call out exact files or evidence for each finding.
Separate verified issues from suspected gaps.
Keep human-owned release or SCM notes in handoff, not as a separate workflow.

workflows.title: Architecture
workflows.description: Architecture workflow for boundary decisions, tradeoff analysis, migration shape, and other changes that are expensive to reverse.
workflows.successDefinition: The decision record names constraints, viable options, the chosen path, rejected alternatives, migration shape, and verification points.

checkLane.title: Architecture Lane
verificationPrompts: Name compatibility assumptions and migration pressure.
Include rollback decision points without claiming production release authority.
Tie verification points to the chosen architecture.

workflows.title: Parallel
workflows.description: Bounded multi-lane workflow for independent workstreams that need clear ownership, parent integration, and end-to-end verification.
workflows.successDefinition: Bounded workstreams are integrated, verified, and closed with explicit residual risks or handoffs.

workflows.title: Debug
workflows.description: Debugging workflow for reproducing failures, narrowing hypotheses, identifying root cause, and proving the smallest safe fix for a real bug or regression.
workflows.successDefinition: The root cause is evidence-backed, the fix is minimal, and the repro or regression path has been rechecked.

checkLane.title: Debug Lane
verificationPrompts: State the repro or best available evidence.
Name what changed and how the repro was rechecked.
List remaining uncertainty if full repro was not possible.

workflows.title: Learn
workflows.description: Learning workflow for turning incidents, regressions, repeated review findings, or debugging evidence into durable prevention assets.
workflows.successDefinition: The lesson is evidence-backed and mapped to durable prevention assets or explicit follow-up.

agents.title: PM planner subagent
agents.focus: Clarify goals, constraints, sequencing, and only the minimum open questions needed to unblock execution.

agents.title: Question asker subagent
agents.focus: Clarify goals, constraints, sequencing, and only the minimum open questions needed to unblock execution.

agents.title: Repo researcher subagent
agents.focus: Read narrowly, map the repo with evidence, and return only concrete findings that help the parent decide the next move.

agents.title: Debug investigator subagent
agents.focus: Read narrowly, map the repo with evidence, and return only concrete findings that help the parent decide the next move.
